productDisplayName: Disney Kids Boy's Baby Mickey Surf Kidswear
description: Composition:100% cotton round neck Tt-shirt with baby mickey printWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent, wash dark colours seperately. Do not soak, do not wring. Turn inside out before drying. Do not bleach. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort FitThis cottn tee from disney with the baby mickey surf print is the best way to give a burst of summer time energy to your tot. Team this ultra comfy tee with casual lowers for a great day out with your little one.
